channel.title: Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Threat Intelligence on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Threat actor abuse of AI accelerates from tool to cyberattack surface
item.description:
Microsoft says threat actors are increasingly using generative AI to improve cyberattacks, including much higher phishing click-through rates and industrialized MFA bypass. The post frames AI as part of the attack surface, not just a tool attackers use.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: security: The threat to critical infrastructure has changed. Has your readiness?
item.description:
Microsoft says critical infrastructure threat patterns are changing and highlights five facts CI leaders should act on in 2026 based on current Microsoft Threat Intelligence observations across sectors. The post is a short security blog entry pointing readers to the full analysis.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
